name: Finzar
oneLine: UK-based filmmaker who teaches Premiere Pro editing and YouTube growth.
bio: Finzar (first name Fin) is a British filmmaker and editor who started making stop-motion shorts as a teenager and went on to work at film studios including Pinewood before launching his YouTube channel. He posts Premiere Pro tutorials, editing breakdowns and YouTube growth advice, and runs Storezar, a shop selling editing presets and courses including a flagship Premiere Pro course.
style: Talking-head tutorials and editing breakdowns on YouTube long-form, plus shorts
notable: How To Edit Like a Pro In Premiere Pro course
BecomeThePremierePro collab series with Adobe Video
